lessons.title: Controlling Pan Temperature
teachingPoints: Heat transfers from the burner to the pan gradually, not instantly.
Overshooting the target temperature is easy — reduce heat before you reach the target.
Holding a steady temperature requires small, constant adjustments.
Different foods require different temperature ranges to cook correctly.

lessons.title: Room Footprints
briefPoints: Design a single, enclosed room footprint.
Hold SHIFT while drawing to snap your walls to strict horizontal or vertical axes.
Ensure your corners touch to close the room.
Click 'Submit Design' when your draft is complete.
